evidence_urls: Direct series-matrix review found all 87 GSE92415 UC subject IDs also present in DS060/GSE87466.

exact_recommended_value: PURSUIT-SC golimumab UC mucosal-expression row. Public GEO metadata show GSE92415 contains 87 baseline UC subjects plus week-6 samples from PURSUIT-SC and 21 healthy controls; direct series-matrix subject-ID review found all 87 GSE92415 UC subject IDs also present in DS060/GSE87466, the adult UC/control subseries of DS060/GSE87473. Do not count DS048 as an independent cohort from DS060. DS048 is not assigned component_of_dataset_id=DS060 because it adds week-6 treatment-response samples, while DS060 also includes a distinct pediatric subseries. No public subject-ID overlap was found with DS083/GSE212849/PROgECT, but absence of controlled crosswalk evidence should remain noted.
